ddls:
CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race to which the result belongs */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking in the race */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet category */,
  "class" TEXT /* Sailing class of the boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Unique sail number */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm (skipper) */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "py" INTEGER /* Performance Yardstick handicap value */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the race */,
  "elapsed" REAL /* Elapsed time in the race */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed */,
  "corrected" REAL /* Corrected time based on PY */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the race started */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time when the race finished */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions during the race */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction during the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_fleet FOREIGN KEY ("fleet") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES sailing_classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_sail_no FOREIGN KEY ("sail_no") REFERENCES boats ("sail_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "min_boat_length" REAL /* Minimum boat length allowed in the fleet */,
  "max_boat_length" REAL /* Maximum boat length allowed in the fleet */,
  "min_crew_count" INTEGER /* Minimum number of crew members required */,
  "max_crew_count" INTEGER /* Maximum number of crew members allowed */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fleet was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the fleet information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailing_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sailing class */,
  "min_boat_length" REAL /* Minimum boat length for the class */,
  "max_boat_length" REAL /* Maximum boat length for the class */,
  "min_crew_count" INTEGER /* Minimum number of crew members required for the class */,
  "max_crew_count" INTEGER /* Maximum number of crew members allowed for the class */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the class information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm (skipper) */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "club" TEXT /* Sailing club affiliation */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the sailor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sailor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sailor registered with the club */,
  "last_race_date" TEXT /* Date of the last race the sailor participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailors_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Unique sail number of the boat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sailing class */,
  "py" INTEGER /* Performance Yardstick handicap value */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat's owner */,
  "boat_length" REAL /* Length of the boat */,
  "boat_weight" REAL /* Weight of the boat */,
  "sail_area" REAL /* Total sail area of the boat */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the boat was registered */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last boat inspection */,
  "inspected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES sailing_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the race is held */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fleet participating in the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., short course, long distance) */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the race started */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time when the race finished */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions during the race */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction during the race */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when race registration opened */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when race registration closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sailing club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the club was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Current number of members in the club */,
  "annual_fees" REAL /* Annual membership fees */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the club's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sailor participating */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat participating */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Unique confirmation number for the registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken for each lap */,
  "penalty" INTEGER /* Penalty points incurred */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the race */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lap */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the lap started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the lap finished */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions during the lap */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the lap */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction during the lap */,
  "boat_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the boat at the start of the lap */,
  "crew_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the crew at the start of the lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_logs_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_logs_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)
